overall.description: First-person perspective walking along the shoulder of a mountain highway in a video game environment (GTA V). Various vehicles including semi-trucks and sports cars pass by on the road while dense pine forests and snow-capped mountains dominate the background under clear sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain highway shoulder with passing traffic

blue sports car speeds past the camera on the right
white van approaches and passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder parallel to the highway traffic

notable_agents.action: large blue semi-truck with trailer driving past on the highway
blue convertible sports car speeding past the camera

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak dominating the background
dense evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the highway
dense pine forest covering the rocky hillside to the right
metal guardrail running along the left edge of the asphalt road
large roadside billboard with 'Paleto' text visible on the left side
utility poles with electrical wires running parallel to the road
large boulders and rocky terrain on the forested hillside

segments.scene_description: Walking along the gravel shoulder of a mountain highway surrounded by dense pine forests. Vehicles including a large semi-truck and sports cars pass by on the multi-lane road to the right. A billboard and power lines are visible on the left, while a massive snow-capped mountain rises in the background under clear sunny skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a mountain highway shoulder, maintaining a steady pace against a backdrop of towering peaks. It begins with the camera walking along a gravel path, flanked by dense pine forests and utility poles. As the camera advances, a large semi-truck and several sports cars streak past on the multi-lane road to the right, creating a sense of motion against the static landscape. The scene then opens up to reveal a billboard on the left, while the perspective remains fixed on a massive, snow-capped mountain that dominates the horizon under clear sunny skies.
